creator: StevenFriedrich@InsightBB.com
text:
While troubleshooting a DRI issue, I was following the steps at
http://dri.freedesktop.org/wiki/DriTroubleshooting.

dmesg | grep -i agp returned nothing.  I have device agp in my kernel conf.

Here's my dmesg:
